name: Be the NEXT: 9 Dreamers
overview: A Philippine idol survival reality competition program that features a pool of 74 aspiring young male artist, all vying for a coveted spot in a new global boy group.

trailers.title: Be The Next 9 Dreamers | Ready to meet your next set of global boy group?
